volume.h1: TEXTS OF SOUTH-INDIAN INSCRIPTIONS. VOL. V.

inscription.head:
No. 1.
(A.R. No. 452 of 1893).
ON A STONE PILLAR SET UP BEHIND THE SHRINE OF THE BHAVANARAYANA TEMPLE AT
SARPAVARAM, COCANADA TALUK, GODAVARI DISTRICT.

h4.note: On the top of this face is engraved the symbol of a discus on a pedestal.
The symbol of the conch is similarly engraved on this face.

l.note:
The continuation is completely worn out. The introduction is Tamil-in-Telugu characters. It
in most of the Tamil inscriptions of Rājēndra Chōla I. It is not impossible that the next number which
mentions the preceptor of King Rājē0ndra Choḍa, is also to be connected with this.

inscription.head:
No. 43.
(A.R. No. 467 of 1893).
ON A PILLAR LYING IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

l.note:
The pillar is much worn out and the writing highly damaged. This face
lines of each numbered separately) might form one connected record. The fourth face contains a dated record.

edition.h4: ON ANOTHER FACE. The symbols of the sun and the crescent are carved at the top.

l.note:
Here and there at the beginning of these 24 lines are seen a
Allāḍa once or twice and Vīrabhadra.

edition.p: 3) Nothing further of this record is seen on the impression.

l.gr:
svasti śrī [||*] cūḍāsiddhasuvarṇapatmasaruciḥ kṣmāpāla••••
•• māṇikkāta[pa]bhā[su]rasya makuṭasyābhya••• ndhadivāni•
mīśvaramāvasanniva kalārūpā• śyatē [||*]

nṛpatapanarēndrēṇaiṣa dattāndadhānō guṇasa[muda]yadhā mnā gōḷakām-
sa••••• ñcirvvēṇukāntāranāthaḥ pariṇata iva bhū[ya]ḥ
pāvakastaṁbhamūrttyām [||*] maṇiśatamahaścitrandēva[sya v]ēṇuva-

nēśiturvvyathita kanakaiḥ puṣpādhārannarēndradivākaraḥ [|*] [pu]rajayadaśādṛ-
pyattatbāhuva•• ścaka•• dhā viḍaṁbanalaṁpaṭam || ślāghyānyu-
pānayata sundarapāṇḍyadēvō vēṇūtbhavāya maṇay[ē ma]ṇibhūṣa-

ṇāni [|*] yairāhatadyuti phaṇāmaṇijālamāsīdālēkhyaratnanibhamābharaṇōragā-
[ṇām] [||*]•• [vēṇuva]nāśra[ya]ḥ pṛthuśilāpaṭṭairnnavaiḥ kalpitaḥ
prāptassu[nda]rapāṇḍyabhūmipatinā sthairyyōttarammaṇḍapam || kā-

manninda[ti] kauṇapādhipabhujakrīḍābhṛśōnmūlanasrastaprastarasandhibandhaśithila-
••• sthitim || ētatsundarapāṇḍyadēvanṛpatiḥ khaṇḍēnducūḍāma-
ṇēścakrē vēṇuvanāspadē • girivrīḍā-

••• puram || manda[spanda]vatā taraṅgitajalā mandākinī[ghaṭṭa]nā dhattē
yachchikharāgra••••• m || sthāṇōrvvēṇuvanēśvarasya mahati
•• kāra••••• ssundarapāṇḍyadēvanṛpa• rvviṣṭam baba-

ndhōpalaiḥ [|*] svairaṁ yatra|gatāgataṁ vidadhati••• samam pāṇi••
•••• [sañc]ārasaukhya[ñci]rāt || ētam vrīhivṛtīśvarasya
vidadhē vi[śvādhi]kaḥ kṣmāpatiḥ prākāram paripanthipā-

namayaśrīmat [vimā-
nōttara]•••• bhāvitāmaragirim yaścakravāḷācalam || yattaddarśayitum
vilikhya niyatannālannarēndrāryyaman [chatra]tvēna

vivartabhāji nikhilē nakṣatravartmanyapi || taḥ stambhavijṛmbhi tanta•• rambhaḥ vi-
••• raiḥ kāntunyaḥ kathayanti karṇṇaga

bhīkarṇṇōjjhitāḥ patrikāḥ ||
bhagnē sundarapāṇḍyadēva bhavatā durggōttarē

kāṭhakē tannārī nayanāmbubhissaridabhūt dhautāmjanaśyāmaḷaiḥ || yam• sargga-
vaśēna•• rmmanirmmāthinī kāḷindasahavāhinīva bhavati tvatkīrttibhāgīrathī ||
sannaddhē naradēva bhāsvati raṇatrāsadrutaṁ kāka-

jēṣu gū[ḍhām] sthitim || durvvārōdaya-
•••••• dantaḥ purastraiṇākrandavijṛmbhitapritiravavyā-
jādivācakṣatē || yēnābhūnmadhurāpatērjalanidhirjvālāmu-

khairmmārggaṇairutsāryyakṣayamātmavāsavi••••••
dayavadhūnētrāntaniṣyandibhistaṁ saṁvaddhya jagattrayīvijayinā jigyē tvayā
bhārggavaḥ śubhamastu || || || ||

kkup perunāṉkellaiyā-

ṉāṉa māṇikkavācaka ṉeḻuttu ||.

ḷiṭṭu amutu[cetuyaruḷaveṇṭu]va-

kār mutal taṉmatāṉa(m)māka iṭṭu variyilār eḻuttu iṭṭa uḷvariyum nam
olaiyum kuṭukkacco[ṉ*]ṉom [|*] ivvicākattu nā-

edition.l:
sasi śrī [||*] pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum puvimaṭantaiyum puyattiruppa nāmaruviya kalai-

koṭu[ñ]cilaiyug kulainto[ḷippa] vāḷā[r*]nta poṟ[ki]rimel varikkayalkaḷ
viḷaiyāṭa iruṅkaṭalva-

l.ta:
[lai]yat ti[ṉi]taṟam perukak karuṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkol naṭappa orukuṭainiḻal
lirunilag kuḷira muvakaittamiḻu muṟaimai[yi]l viḷaṅka nālvakai vetamu naviṉ-
ṟuṭaṉ vaḷara aiyvakaiveḻviyuñ ceyviṉai yiyaṟṟa aṟuvakaic camaiyamum aḻaku-
ṭan tikaḻa eḻu-

vakaippāṭalu miyaluṭaṉ parava eṇṭicaiyaḷavuñ cakkarañ cellak koṅkaṇar kali-
ṅkar kocalar māḷuvar ciṅkaḷar teliṅkar kiṉṉara[r*] kuccarar villavar makatar
vikkalar cempiyar pallavar mutaliyar pāttivar ellā muṟaiviṭa maruḷeṉa oru-
varmuṉ ṉoruvar muṟaimuṟai kaṭava tanti-

ṟai ku[ṇa]ntiṟaiñca ilaṅkoḷi maṇimuṭi yintiraṉ pūṭṭiya polaṉkati rārama
mārviṉiṟ poliya paṉimalar(ṟ) tāmarait ticaimukaṉ paṭaitta maṉuneṟi
taḻaippa maṇimuṭi cūṭip poṉṉicūḻnāṭṭup puliyāṇai poyakal kaṉṉicūḻ-
nāṭṭiṟ kayalāṇai kaiyvaḷara veñciṉa vivuḷiyum v-

eḻamum [para]raparappit tañcaiyu muṟantaiyuñ centaḻal koḷutti kāvinilamum
niṉṟu kaviniḻaṟṟa āviyu māṟu maṇinirnala ṉaḻittu kūṭamu māmatiḷug kopuramum
māṭaraṅkum māḷikaiyum maṇṭapamum pala iṭittu toḻutuvantaṭaiyār nirupar-
tan tokaiya raḻuta kaṇṇī rāṟu parappik kaḻu-

peṟṟa putalvaṉai niṉpereṉṟu muṉkāṭṭi veṟṟi yariyaṇaikkiḻ [vi]ḻuntu
toḻu ti[ra]ppat tāṉoṭi muṉṉiḻanta vemmai-

yelāg kaiyyaka[la] tāṉo(u)takam paṇṇi taṇṭār muṭi[yuṭa]ṉe viṭṭa akaliṭan-
taṉ mārveḷaikkuttiliya iṭṭapaṭik keṉṟum itu piṭipāṭāka veṉap poṅkuti-

ṟu tāṉ virar koṉ [m]ākamukaṭu taṭavi maḻai maṭukkum kākaneṭumpantaṟ k[e]•

yāṇṭu 20- vatu nāḷ 374- ṉāl kiḻvempanāṭṭut [ti]runelvelik koyiṟ
paḷḷiyaṟaikūṭattup paḷḷippiṭam maḻavarāyaṉil eḻuntaruḷiyi[ru]ntu uṭaiyār
tirunelveliuṭaiyar ko[yi]ṟ patipā[ta]mulap-

l.ta:
[pa]ṭṭu[ṭ]aip pa[ñ]cā[cā]riya tevarkaṉmikaḷ cey[ya]ttiruvāymoḻintaru-
ḷiṉapaṭi [k]ālaṭiccaṅkaraṉ a[ḻakiyap]erumā[ṉāṉa] ma[ḻa]varāyar pū[ji]ttu ik-
[k]oyilil ā

māka eḻuntaru[ḷi]vitta cokkaṉār(r)kku tiruppa[ṭimāṟ]
ṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum niva[n]taṅkaḷukkum i-

pūjai ceyya amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi yuḷḷiṭṭu
veṇṭuvaṉavukkum muḷḷināṭṭu irājarāja

maṅkalattu piṭākai kayat-
tāṉkuṟucciyil k[ā*]rpacāṉam viḷaiyunilattu maṇṭalamutaṉmai[k]ku ivar
pitākkaḷ appāṭṭar maḻava[r]-

āyaṟku jivitamāy [pi]ṉpu ivaṟku maṇṭalamutaṉmaikku jivitamāy varukiṟa nilattu
talaivarucai nilattile i[v]vūr kaṭamaiyiṟukkug kolāla oṉṟaṟaive[li]
nilam irupatāvatiṉ etirāmāṇṭu mutal antar[ā*]yamum uḻutāṉkuṭiyum uṭ-
paṭat tevatāṉa iṟaiyiliyā[y] iṟuppatāka i-

ṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu ivar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil ittevaṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟa-
ṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭun nivantaṅkaḷukkum ivar piṟa[n*]ta catayattu nāḷ

pūjai ceyya amutupaṭi cāttu[p]paṭi uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku[m] muḷḷi-
nāṭṭu i

kai kayattāṉ[ku]ṟucciyil kārpacāṉam viḷaiyum nilattu maṇ[ṭa]lamutaṉmaikku

muṭai-

ñcey puṉceyyum na[t*]tamum toṭṭamug kuḷamug kuḷapparippu muṭpaṭṭa nila-

tavirttu ivviraviva

maṅkalattuṭaṉ kūṭṭi oru rorupura vākka
veṉṟum ivvūr kaṭamai yiṟukkumiṭattu irupattunālaṭiyāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ

cciyum veṭṭiyum pāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavu

ivvūr kaṭamai iṟukkumiṭattu irupattunālaṭiyāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl

[mu]m kuḷamug kuḷapparippum uṭpa[ṭ]ṭa nilattil paḷḷiccantam [pa]ḻantevatā-

oru[r] orupuravākkik kuṭiyirukkal[ā]m nattattile kuṭiyiruppākap paṅkum maṉai-

nattamu muṭpaṭa cuntarapāṇṭi[ya]ṉ kolāl nilam nālumāvum nikki nikki uḷḷa

iruppākap [pa]ṅkum maṉaiyum eḻuti murappu[n]āṭṭup pocaḷavira

yañ ceyva-
tā[ka] iṭukaveṉṟum ivvūr iṟukkumiṭattu irupattu

[n]ā[la]ṭiyāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉkolāl nilamaḷantu payir pā[r][t*]tu viḷainta

kācu kālum mutal virapāṇṭiyaṉāl nellu mukkalamum tulāviṟaiccu viḷainta

inscription.head:
No. 449.
(A.R. No. 157 of 1894). This inscription is written in later characters and seems to be a copy. In writing it, the engraver
has committed several mistakes.
ON TWO PILLARS OF THE MANDAPA ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE LARGE SHRINE IN THE
SAME TEMPLE.

inscription.head:
No. 459.
(A.R. No. 166 of 1894).
ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE PUSHPAVANESVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUPPUNDURUTTI,
TANJORE TALUK AND SAME DISTRICT.

edition.l:
svasti śrī [||*] pū[ma]lar vaḷar[ti]kaḻ tirumakaḷ pukaḻākam puṇarn tiruppa nāmalar vaḷar
kalai vañci nalamiku māmaṉat tuṟaiyac cimaiyavarait tiṟaṉmaṭantai tiruttoḷiṉ
micai vāḻa vimaiyavar-

l.ta:
ko ṉaṉṟiṭ[ṭa] veḻilārag kaḻut tilaṅkap pakiratipol tuyyapukaṭ paṭara valli
koḻuntoṭṭat tikirivaraik kappuṟattuc ceḻuntikiri ceṉṟulavat taṇṭā-
[roḷit] [ta]ṉikkavitai teṇṭirai cūḻ pārniḻaṟṟa ve-

ṅkopak kali ka[ṭin]tu ceṅko leṇṭicai naṭappat temmuṟaciṉ mukil muḻaṅkac
cilai yakaṉṟu vicumpaṭaiyat tiṟaṟpuli poy vaṉamaṭaiyak kayaliraṇṭu neṭuñci-
karak kaṉavaraiyiṉ viḷaiyāṭa vorumaimaṉat tirupiṟappiṉ muttiyiṉ nāl-

vetat tarumaṟai[y]o raivveḻvi yāṟaṅkamuṭaṉ ciṟappa varuntamiḻu māriyamu maṟu-
camaiyat taṟaneṟiyun tiruntu maṉuṉeṟiyun tiṟampāttu taḻaittoṅkak kuccararu
māriyarum kocala[ru*]g koṅkaṇarum vaccirarug kāciyaru māttararu-

••••• rumaṉaruñ coṉakarum vantiyaru mutalāya virunila māmuṭi-
venta riṟaiñci niṉṟu tiṟaikāṭṭa[vu]m [neṭu]vāḷum vayapperum puraviyun
toṭi neṭu[n*] toḷume tuṇaiyeṉac ceṉṟu ceraṉun tāṉaiyuñ ceruk-

kaḷat t[oḻiya] [va*]varācum pularā malaināṭu nūṟap parumāmarapiṟ porutiṟal mikka
ceṉṉiyait tiṟaikoṇṭu tiṇṭoḷvaliyiṟ poṉṉināṭṭup pocalat
taraicarkaḷaip puricaiyi [la]ṭaittup poṅkuvirap puraviyu[r] ceruviṟal

āṇmai ciṅkaṇaṉ mutalāya taṇṭat talaivarun tāṉaiyum paṭa[t] tuṇṭit taḷavil
cori veṅkaluṭ perumpiṇak kuṉṟa miruṅkaḷa ṉiṟaittup paruntug kākamum
pāṟug [ka]caiyu marunti mikaḻntāl amaṟkaḷa meṭuppak kama• [ṇai]-

yug kaviṉap puraviyuñ cempoṟ kuvaiyun tikaḻkatirmaṇiyu maṭantaiya rarā mārpu-
muṭaṉkavarntaruḷi mutukiṭu pocalaṉ ṟaṉṉoṭu muṉaiyumatu tavaṟeṉṟavaṉ-
ṟaṉṉai veṟpeṟṟi naṭa • tupo luṭpakaiyāy niṉṟa cemaṉaik koṉ-

ṟu ciṉa[n ta]ṇinta[ru]ḷi naṇṇutal piṟarā leṇṇutaṟ kariya kaṇ[ṇa]ṉuṟ kop-
pattaik kaikkoṇṭaruḷip poṉṉicūḻ celva puṉṉāṭṭai [p]oṉṉinā-
ṭeṉak kāttaruḷa ceya[pe]ruvarai [ya]raṇiṟ piṉṉarukākkiya karunaṭarāca-

[ṉai]k kaḷiṟu tiṟaikoṇṭu tulaṅkoḷi maṇiyuñ cūḻiveḻamu [mi]laṅkai kāva-
laṉai yiṟaikoṇṭaruḷi varutiṟai maṟutta vaṅkaṉaip piṭittuk karumukil ni[ka]ḷag
kāliṟ kottu ventar kaṇṭaṟiyā viṟaṟṟiṇpuracaic centamaṅkalac ceḻumpati
muṟṟip-

pallavaṉaṭuṅkap pal porāṭi nelviḷaināṭu neṭumperum poṉṉum parumaiyāṉai-
yum pariyu mutaliya varacurimai kaikkoṇ ṭaracavaṟ kaḷittut tillaiyampalattut
tirunaṭampayilun tollaiyiṟaivar tuṇaikkaḻal vaṇa-

ṅkik kuḷirpoḻil puṭaicūḻ koḻimāṉaka raḷiceṟi vempi ṉaṇimalar kalanta
toṅkal vākait toṭaikaḷ cūṭṭit tiṅka ḷuyarmarapu tikaḻa vantirunta taṉ-
[ṉa]caiyā ṉaṉṉilai vicaiyampi ṉeṇṇeṇkalai teriṉa moḻippāvalar maṇ-
ṇiṉame

lūḻi vāḻkeṉa [vā][ḻ*]ttak kaṇṭavar maṉamug [kaṇ*]kaḷug kaḷippa veṇṭirai
makaravelaiyi ṉeṭuvarai yāyiram paṇaippaṇat taṉantaṉ mimicaip pāyalkoḷ-
ḷum paramay[o]kat toruperug kaṭavu ḷuvantiṉituṟaiyu mipe[rug] kaṭa[l*]-
viriyiṭainilat tilaṅkun tiruvaraṅkam peruñ-

celvam ciṟappapa paṉmuṟai paṇi tul[ā*]pāra meṟip poṉmalaiyeṉṉa polintu
toṉṟavum poṉmeyntaruḷiya cempoṟ koyiluḷ vaḷartikaḻpā lutaiya-
veṟpaṉait tiruvaḷa[r] kulamaṇic ciṅkācaṉa[mi]caik [ka]laiyeṉa makiḻn tiṉi-
teṟit tiṉakaro
ḻuṅkatir coriyum kaṉakamāmuṭi kaviṉpeṟac cūṭip pārāḷ ve

rurimai [ri]-
vaiya rirumaruṅku niṉṟu viriperug kavariyiṉ mantavāṭaiyu malaitteṉṟalu
m[ā*]ntaḷiṟ karaṅkoṇ ṭacaiya vica vorupoḻutum viṭātuṭaṉiruntu makiḻum
tirumakaḷeṉṉa tiruttoḷ mevi y[o]t-

ta muṭi cūṭi yuyur per[ā*]ṇai tikkeṭṭu naṭappac ceḻuntavañ ceyta vivaṉpo
lulakile viraṉ palattira matimukat tavaṉimāmaka ḷilaku koṭik kātal mukuḻttu
niṉṟ[e*]ttu mulakumuḻutumuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkoccaṭapaṉ-
marāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcu[n]tarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu

yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa at-
ta[t]tu nāḷ pāṇṭikulapativaḷanāṭṭu āṟkāṭṭukūṟṟattu uṭaiyār tiruppūntu-
ruttiuṭaiyār koyil āticaṇṭe
tecam tiruppūnturutti uḷḷiṭṭu teṉkarai vaṭakaraippaṭṭa te-

vaṉapperumāṉaiyum nācciyāraiyum nāya-
kar tiruviti nācciyār marakata[nāc]ciyāraiyum periyatevanāyaṉāraiyum [nā*]c-
ciyāraiyum iṉṉāṭṭuk [kiḷi]yūrnā[ṭṭu]k [ki]ḻmāntuṭai-

yāṉa uyyavantāṉ irācarācatevar kumpiṭṭu innāyaṉmārkkum nāccimārkkum
amutupaṭi paṭiviñcaṉattukku innāyaṉār tevatāṉam kiḻaipparivaṇṭattuṟai-
yil curaikkuṭaiyāṉ āḷuṭaināyaṉ pakkal tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka ivarvilai-
koṇṭu kuṭutta po-

innilam araiyekā-
[ṇi]yiṉāl pottakam eṟṟiṉa nilam cantirātittavaraiyum mutal aṭaṅka iṟai
yili ceytu kuṭukkaiyil inilam ivvūrilk kaḻittu i[n*]nilattāl varum an-
karāyavaricai-

ppaṭi kācum o[ṭ]ṭupa[ṭi] nellukkum pūṇṭa tevarkaṭamaiyum puṟa uṭalkkaṭamaiyum
viṉipokaṅkaḷum uḷḷiṭṭu ūrmā[tt*]āl vanta kaṭamai kuṭimai innāyiṉār
tevattaṉamāṉa

viḻukkāṭu koṇṭu iṟukkakkaṭavomākaRead sammatittu.sammatattu kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom ip-

l.ta: ṉic celviyun taṉ perunteviyarāki iṉpuṟu neṭutuya rūḻiyuḷ iṭaituṟainā-

ṭun tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇ-
ṇaṟ karumura-

ṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porutaṭa rīḻattaraiyarta muṭiyum āṅkavaṉ ṟeviya rog-
keḻil muṭiyu-

tum eṟipaṭaik keraḷar muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭug kulataṉam[ā]ki[ya] pala[r*]pukaḻ muṭi-
yuñ ceṅkatir
kā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paraicur[āma]ṉ melvaruñ cā

muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ aḷapperum
pukaḻoṭu pi[ṭi]-

yar iraṭṭa[p]āṭi eḻaraiyilakkamu ṉavaṉatik kulapperu malaikaḷum vikkiramavira
cakkarakoṭṭamu mutur-
paḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻaṉa mācuṇitecamu mayarvil vaṇkīrtti ayā tinakarayiṟ ca

ṭu niṟai kulataṉak kuvaiyug kiṭṭaruñceṟimiḷai oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcuracer nal-
kocalainā-

vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolai [taṇṭapu]ttiyum iraṇa-
cūraṉai muṟaṇu-
ṟat tākkit tikkaṇa kīrttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovi
cuvittaruḷi oṇṭiṟaliyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramu nittila neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭa-
mu veṟimalarttirtta tteṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celittic
kkariyoṭu makappaṭap piṭit turimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum ārttava ṉa-

k(ā)ṉakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamu mo[y*]ttoḷir puṉa-
maṇip putavamug kaṉa-

tuṟainirp paṉṉaiyu maṉmalaivāraiyiṟ ṟeṉ[malaiyū]rum ā[ḻ]kaṭa
lakaḻcūḻ māji-

riṭiṅkamug kala[g]kā valviṉai yilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷa-
mug kāvalam-

ṭukaṭaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu māpporu taṇṭāṟ
koṇṭa koppara

varkku yāṇṭu patināṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa-
coḻamaṇ[ṭila]ttu kaḷattūr-
ṉ koḷḷampākkiḻāṉ mātevaṉ eṭṭi vaitta tirunu

ḻākki vaitta viḷakka[rai]

edition.l: svasti śrī [||*] tiṅkaḷ ērtaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇ[ku]-

l.ta: ṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇar[n]tu ceṅko loccik karuṅkali kaṭi

teṉṉavar muvaruḷ vānaka m[o]ruvaṉuk karuḷik kāṉaka mi[ru]varuk kaḷittup po-
rucilai c[e]-

ai y[e]vik kaṉṉāṭakar viṭuka•••• [ṭa]yiṟ ṟamiḻppara[ṇi]-
[k]oṇ ṭoṉṉār••••
neṭuvāḷ viccayaṉ verune[ḷi]t tañ[ci o]ṭat taṉ vañcip paṭaiyāl āṅka[va]-
ṉ pitāvai mātāvoṭu cataramali vi[g]ku nīrappuṇṭura veñcamat takappaṭutta[p]
havamallaṉ payattoṭum avarviṭum oṟṟarai veruvap pi[ṭi]-
t tā[g][ka*]var mārvil āhavamallaṉ āṅkaṇu mañciṉa neṉṉa naṉkeḻu[ti]-

uriyum ikkoyi[lil]

ṉeṉṟun tayaratRead tuyarat.taṉpoṭu karutu kātala[ruḷi]t talampuka ḻirājentiracoḻaṉai
uttamacoḻa ṉeṉṟun tottaṇi mukaiyavi ḻalaṅkal muṭikoṇṭacoḻaṉai
yikal vijai yālaya ṉeṉṟum pukarmukat te[ḻu]yarkaḷuṟṟuc coḻakeraḷaṉai
v[ār]cilaic coḻakeraḷa ṉeṉṟun tiṇaṭiṟalk kaṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉait ti-
[ṉa]karaṉ kulattuc ciṟappamar coḻacaṉakarāja ṉeṉṟug kaṉaikaḻalp paṭikoṇṭa
pulapuka[ḻ*] muṭikoṇṭacoḻaṉaic cuntaraco[ḻa*] ṉeṉṟuñ centamiḻ pi[ṭiya
li]raṭṭapāṭi koṇṭacoḻaṉai tolpuviyāḷuṭai coḻakaṉṉakucciyarāja
ṉ[e][ṉ]ṟum piṉṉun taṉ kātalarkātalar tam[muḷ] m[etakuka]tirāg kaṉaikaḻal
maturāntakaṉait tolpaṭaic coḻavallapa ṉeṉṟu māṉaccilaikkai yorāṉaic
ce[va]kaṉai

ṉāḷiṉu(ḷiṉu)ḷ kalveṭṭeḻuntu [o]ṇṭiṟa liruṭṭamaṇṭalameytiy natikaḷuṉā-

kki yākavama[l*]laṉ paripava miṉakkiteṉ ṟeriviḻit teḻuntu cepparu[g]kittik
koḷappat takavaiyi nuṭaṉ ṟamar tuṭaṅkiyapoḻu tavaṉ ceñcaramāri taṉ kuñca[rak
ku]vaṭṭilun ta[ṉ*] ṟiruttuṭaiyilug kuṉṟuko[ḷ*] puyat[ti]nu [mai]takkavum

paṭai vaḻaṅki moñ

pamar caḷukki tampi cayaciṅkanum porp pulakkeciyum tārt-

ta[lai]ma[yi]r virittu muṉnuṟa neḷittup piṉnuṟa ṉokkik kālpaṟittoṭi (to-
ṭi) melkaṭal pāyat tuṟattiyapoḻu taccerukkaḷattaviṭu ca[t]turupuyaṅkaraṉ kara-

koṇṭaruḷi ilaṅkaik kiṟaivan mānāparaṇan kātala riruvaraik kaḷat[ti]ṭaip
[pi]ṭittu mā[pp]erumpu[ka*]ḻ [mi]ka vaḷartta kopparakecariva

vatānag kukkanūr ellaiyetta makappaṭak [kār pacāṉa] nilat-

kurāvan peḻaikkum ivvūrkkiḻeri nirkoppukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai
ivvūr•• pālārkiḻkaraikkum [i]lattaikkuṭṭaik kiḻkaraikku kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟkellai [civapā]tacekara[na]llū rellaikkut teṟkum ivvūr ellaiet-
tam uṭpaṭṭa mātavan kammuṅkālug karaiyum āka [i]ṉṉāṟpāṟ kellaiyuḷḷum
naṭuvupaṭṭa nila mukutik kuṟai [vu]ḷḷaṭaṅka [mutaṟ ta]rattu kuḻi munṟum atikāri-
kaḷ ālattūruṭaiyān [tiv]ākaran••

[emmi*]licainta krayadravyam ••••• nilañ cuṭṭi

inscription.head:

published by Messrs Butterworth and Venugopala Chetty their texts are given here as there are differences
in reading.

inscription.head:
No. 521.
(A.R. No. 222 of 1894).
ON THE BASE OF THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

edition.l:
svisti śrī [||*] tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyum taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai
manakkoḷak [k](ā)ntannū rccā[lai] kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaiñāṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum
nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaiñāṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum eṇṭi-
cai pukaḻtara īḻamaṇṭalamum iraṭṭapāṭi eḻarai ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉ-
ṟittaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉneḻil [vaḷaruḻi]yuḷ ḷellā [y]āṇṭum toḻuteḻa
viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarājakesaripanma rāṉa
śrīrājarājadē varkku yāṇṭu 24 āvatu uṭaiyārśrīrājarājadē var nampirāṭ-
ṭiyār taṉticattiviṭaṅkiyārāna śrīolokamādē viyār vaṭakarai rājēntra-
siṁ havaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu tiruvai yāṟṟuppāl nām eṭuppit[ta] tiruk-
kaṟṟaḷi olokamādē viīśva ramuṭaiya ma hādē varkkum olokaviṭaṅkadēva ruḷ-
ḷiṭṭa tirumenikaḷukkum ceyvitta poṟkoḷkai mutaliya uḷḷa tiruvābha ra-
ṇaṅkaḷum tirupparikalaṅkaḷum kallile [v]eṭṭuvikka venṟu uṭanakūṭṭattu ati-
kāram ceykiṉṟa kovalūruṭ ai yān kāṭan ṉūṟṟeṇmanai yum atikāricci
erutan kuñciramalliyaiyum ariḷicceyya [kal]veṭṭiṉapaṭi koḷkaittevar
vaḷaiyi liraṇ ṭuḷpaṭak [ku]ṭiñaikkallālp pon niṟai muvāyirattiruṉū-
ṟṟeḻupattu mukkaḻañcum paṭṭam muṉṟināl poṉ niṟai eṇpatto[ṉ]patan
kaḻañceykālum ponnin tāmaraippoṟpū oṉ[ṟi]nāl niṟai patiṉ kaḻañcum
olokaviṭaṅkadē var cāttiaruḷum mu[ṭi] oṉṟu pon niṟai nūṟṟai ṅkaḻañca-

[ḻa]vāykkālukku teṟku añc[āg kaṇ]ṇāṟṟu iraṇṭāṉ tuṇṭattu mekka
ṭaiya nilam araimā muṉtirikai iṉnilam araimā muṉtirikaiyum brahmadēya]

l.ta:
[m] punavāyilāna vikkirama••• timaṅkalattu pe[ruma]rutūr āttirai-
yaṉ nampippirāṉ ātittapaṭṭaṉ uḷḷiṭṭār ittirunaṉ-

ta[vaṉa]m ceyvāṟku uṭa••• namakku nirvār[ttu]t taṉta nāṭaṟipukaḻ-
nallūr kaṇṭarātittavatikkuk [ki]ḻakku cuṉtaracoḻavā[y*]kkālukku vaṭa[k]-

ku āṟāg [kaṇṇāṟṟu] nālāñ [catirattu] meṟkaṭaiya nilam orumā mukkāṇi
nikki itaṉ kiḻakku kulottuṅkaco[ḻamaṅkala]ttut taṉta nilam araikkā-

[ṇi iṉnilam arai]kkāṇiyum•• ūṟpaṭi nilam irumāvarai muṉtirikai
iṉnilam irumāvarai muṉtirikaiyum ittevatā-

nam••• paṭa• yiṟu•• ṉa nilattu iṟai mikutiyāna
u[ṭa]l ittirunaṉtavana•••••

tittavaṟ•• cellakkaṭavatāka kalveṭa-
ṭik kuṭutteṉ eyiṟ•••••

i•••• ūraṉṉeṉ [eḻuttu] ippaṭikku ivai perumarutūṟ
kavuciyaṉ āḷavaṉ•••••

•••• citaraṉ nāraciṅkapaṭṭaṉ eḻuttu ip•••• ṉ
tañcai tiruuṭaiyā-

•••• eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai koyiṟ [kaṇakku] neṟkuppaiyu-
ṭaiyāṉ kūttāṭuvāṉ ā-

ḷuṭaiyāṉ tirumaḻapāṭi nampi eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivaik koyiṟkaṇakku neṟ-
kuppaiuṭaiyāṉ ā-

rāvamutu kūttāṭuvāṉ irā[ca]rā[ca] muveṉtaveḷāṉ [e]ḻuttu ippaṭikku
ivai perumarutūr āttireyaṉ
nampippirā[ṉ ā]tittapaṭṭaṉ eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai perumarutūr āt

l.ta: malkiya vaṭaticaik kaṅkaiyu[m] tenṟicai ilaṅkaiyum kuṭaticai

caik kaṭāramum taṇṭinil koṇṭa tātai tan maṇṭala veṇkuṭai niḻalena taṇ-
kuṭai niḻaṟ-

[ṟi] ticaitoṟum ceṅko locci malikeḻu tennavan mānāparaṇan ponmuṭippa-
ru[ma]ṇippacu
porukaḷat tarintu veṇāṭṭaracai ceṇāṭ ṭotukki kūvakattaracai cevaka

ḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttataṟpin tankulat tavanivar nankutaru takaimaiyil ariciya lurimai
muṟaimaiyi le-
[t]ti villavan v[ā*]navan veḻkulac caḷukkiyar vallavar mutalāy vaṇaṅka vīṟṟiru-

yom iyyāṭṭai minanāyaṟṟu putan-
kiḻamai peṟṟa u-
lam iraṇṭey mukkāle orumā varaikkāṇi mu

rikaik kiḻmukkāl itu tara[mi-
ṭṭu ma]ṭakki nilam

kaḷ iṟukkak kaṭavārākavum ninṟa cempātiyāl nilam nānmā varai
mu
m ipparicu ittevar nilattil cempātiyāna nilam nānmā varai mu

mel eṟa iṟai koḷḷappeṟā-

ttu niy[o]kag kuṭuttom perug-

kal vilaikoṇṭu tirumañ[ca*]nappuṟamāka viṭṭa veḷḷāṉvaricai nila[m*] kāṇi
araik-
kāṇi itil iṟuppukku nilam kāṇi tirumañcanam [eṭu]kkum [ti]rumeṉik[ku]

edition.l: svasti śrī [||*] tiru manni vaḷara irunila maṭant aiyum por[c]-

l.ta: tuṭarvanavelip paṭar vanavāciyum cuḷḷicūḻ matiṭ koḷḷi-
kaṭa līḻattaraiyarta muṭiyum āṅkavana ṟeviya roṅkeḻi-
l muṭiyum mun navarpakkal tennavan vaiytta cu
ra nāramum teṇṭirai īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum eṟipaṭaik ke[ra]-
ḷan muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭi[yu]m ceṅkatir mā-
pattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman mevaruñ cā

mpoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta caya-
ciṅkan

aḻapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiya[l*] iraṭṭapāṭi eḻarai ilakkamum puna[ne]tikkulap-
perumalaika-

ḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavalla maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷa
nāma-

ḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟaikula tanakkuv[ai]yum ki[ṭṭa]rum ceṟi[mi]ḷai
yoṭṭavi-

yamum pūcura[r*]ce[r*] nalk kocalaināṭum tanmapālanai vemmunai yaḻittu
vaṇṭuṟai co-

lait taṇṭaputtiyum iraṇa[cū]ranai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇakirtti takkaṇalāṭa-
mum kovi

ṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkuvoṭ-
ṭal mahipālanai veñ-

camarviḷākattañcuvittaruḷi oṇṭiṟal yānaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilane-
ṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamu-

m veṟimalart tirtta teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttik
caṅkirāmavicaiyo-

ttuṅkapanmanākiya kaṭārattaraiyanai vākayam porukaṭal kumpaṟkariyoṭu makappaṭut
turimaiyil piṟakkiya

perunatit tiṟakkamum ārttava(n)nak(ā)nakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātira
toraṇamum meytt[oḷi]r punamaṇip

putavamum kanamaṇik katavamum niṟai śrīvicayamum tuṟainirp pannaiyum vanamalaiyūrai-
yiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum āḻkaṭala-

kaḻcūḻ māyiruṭi(li)ṅkamum kalaṅkā val[vi]nai ilaṅkācokamum koppuṟu niṟai-
nal mā[p]pa pāḷamum kāvalan puricai

mevilimpaṅkamum viḷappantūṟuṭai vaḷappantūṟum kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittak-
kolamum ti[ta]māvalvi-

ṟal lāmuritecamum tenakkalar poḻil mānakka-
vāramum [t]oṭukaṭal kāva-
ṟ kaṭumu[ra]ṭ kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripa

var tiru-
makaḷār piḷḷaiyār arumoḻi naṅkaiyā-

viḷakku iraṇṭinukkuk kuṭuttaruḷina cāvā
muvāp perāṭu nuṟṟeṇpatu ivaiyi-

ṟṟil ivvūr iṭaiyan paṭṭālakan nā[ra*]ṇan koṇṭa āṭu nāṟpattañcināl
nicatam aṭṭakkaṭava ney āḻākkum kuñcira-

mallan peruvaḻiyum kuñciramallan kāṭanum kuñciramallan tirumālug koṇṭa
āṭu nāṟpattañcināl nicatam

aṭṭakkaṭava ney āḻākkum araṅkan pāṇṭan koṇṭa āṭu irupattiraṇṭarai-
yināl nicatam aṭṭakkaṭava ney irucevi ṭa-

raiyum araṅkan maḻuvāṭiyum araṅkan kaṇavatiyum araṅkan kāṭukāḷum koṇṭa āṭu
irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl nicatam aṭ-

kkaṭava ney iruceviṭaraiyum cūṟṟi maḻuvāṭi koṇṭa āṭu irupattiraṇṭarai-
[yi]nāl nicatam aṭṭakkaṭava ney irucevi ṭaraiyu-

m maḻuvāṭi kaṇavati koṇṭa āṭu irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl nicatam aṭṭakkaṭava
ney irucevi ṭaraiyum āka ivarkaḷ koṇṭa

āṭu nuṟṟeṇpatinālum tirumaḻuvāṭi uṭaiyār paṇṭārattu paṇṭāranāḻiyāla
nicatam aṭṭakkaṭava ney uri-

viḷakku iraṇṭum erikkakaṭavom
tirumaḻuvāṭi uṭaiyār tevarka

•••• ivviḷakku eriya pirān vaittaruḷina tarāviḷakku uṭkaru vuṭpaṭa
āṟucā ṇucarattu [viḷakku] iraṇṭi-

edition.l: svasti śrī [||*] tiru manni vaḷara irunila maṭant aiyum porcceyap pāvaiyu-

l.ta: tuṟaināṭum tuṭarvanavelip paṭar vanvāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷi-
muṭiyum āṅkavan ṟeviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum mun navarpakkal tennavan
ra nāramum tenṟicai īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu[m] e-
ṟipaṭaik keraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭuma kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ mu-
ṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperug kāval pala paḻa
vil cinavi irupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman melvaruñ cā
ti iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyag[kiyai] mutuki-

ṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅkan aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiya[l*] raṭṭapāṭi eḻarai ilakka-
mum na[vane]-

laivira pañca[p]paḷḷiyum [p]āciṭaippaḻana mācuṇitecamum ayarvil vaṇ[ki]rtti(y)
yāti-

raratanai viḷai yamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum
piṭittu pa-

la tanattoṭu niṟaikula[ta]nak kuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭaviṣayamum
pūcura[r*] cer nal
kocalaināṭum [tanama]pālanai vemmunai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyu-
m iraṇacūranai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇakirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovi
ṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal caṅku voṭṭaṭai mayipālanai

ve[ñ]camarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi oṇṭiṟal yānaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum
nittalaneṭu-

ṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tir[t*]ta teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ
[pa]la kalañ

riyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya p[e]runeti[p pi]ṟakkamum ārttava na(na)k(ā)-
nakar porttoḻi-

l vācalil viccātiratoraṇamum moyttaḷir punamaṇip putavamum kanamaṇi[k*]
katavamum niṟai jīvicai-

yamum tuṟainīrp pannaiyum vanmalaiyuraiyiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum [āḻ]kaṭa lakaḻ cūḻ
māyiruṭi-

[li]ṅkamum kalaṅkā valvinai ilaṅkācokamum koppuṟu niṟaipunal māpap[p]āḷa-
mum kāvalam-

puricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷappan[tū]ṟuṭai vaḷappantūṟum kalaittakkol pukaḻ
talait-

tenakkalar poḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṟkiṭāramum māppo-
ru taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparake-

n kau[ca]laiyār
uṭaiyārkku iravum pakalum erivataṟku oru ti-

viḷakkukku vaiytta kācu nūṟum meṟpaṭiyārey vaiytta tarā nilaiviḷakku
onṟu uḷkaru vuṭppaṭa niṟai

viḷakkukku vaiytta kācu nūṟum koṇṭu āṭu toṇṇūṟu ko-
ṇṭu ca

ḷakku eriya nāṅkaḷum eṅkaḷ varkkattārum aṭṭakkaṭavomenṟu manṟāṭi celvan
kuṭṭeṟan koṇṭa kācu irupattaiñcināl

[āṭu] irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl āṇṭuvarai aṭṭakkaṭava ney irupattirunāḻi
uriyum celvan parampan koṇṭa kācu irupattaiñcinā-

l āṭu irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl aṭṭakkaṭava ney irupattirunāḻi uriyum eccil
aravaṇaiyānum cūṟṟi tirumaḻupāṭiyum nakkan kaṭikā[ca]-

lanum koṇṭa kācu irupattaiñcināl āṭu irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl aṭṭakkaṭava
ney irupattirunāḻi uriyum tāḻi tiripuvanavicai-

yan koṇṭa kācu irupattaiñcināl āṭu irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl ney irupat-
tirunāḻi uriyum āka ivvanaivomākak koṇṭa

kācu nūṟināl āṭu toṇṇūṟināl āṇṭuvarai aṭṭakkaṭava ney toṇ-
ṇūṟṟu nāḻiyum nāṅkaḷum eṅkaḷ varkkattārum ca

inscription.head:
No. 637.
(A.R. No. 78-A of 1895).
ON THE SAME WALL.

l.ta:
viyarāki inpuṟa neṭutuyaruḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭar-
vanavelip paṭar vanavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ

matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻat-
taraiyarta muṭiyum āṅkavan teviya rog-
keḻil muṭiyum mun navarpakkal tennavan vaiytta cu

eṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir
mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tol[pe]-

vum ceruviṟ cinavi irupattorukā laracukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman
melvaruñ cā

ya cempoṟ ṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta
cayaciṅkan aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiya-

[l i]raṭṭapāṭi ēḻarai ilakkamum nava[n*]etik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkira[ma-
virar] cakkarakoṭṭamum

mutirpaṭa valla maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭai vaḷa[r*]kāmaṇaykkoṇaiyum [ve]ñ-
cilai virar pa-

ñca[p]paḷḷiyum pācaṭai[y pa]ḻana mācuṇitecamum [aya]rvil vaṇkirttiy yāti
nakaravai-

palatanattoṭum niṟaikulatanak kuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭaviṣaiyamum
pūcu[ra]-

rcer nalk kocalaināṭum tanmapālanai vemmunai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait
taṇṭa-

puttiyum iraṇacūranai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇakirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovi-
(c)ca

ṭa taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkuvoṭṭai mahi-
pālanai

veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi oṇṭiṟal yānaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāra[mu]m
nittila
neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipunal ka[ṅkaiyu]m alai-
kaṭal naṭuvuḷ pala kalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅkapanamak[āki]ya kaṭārat-

ta[rai]yanai vākaiyamporukaṭal kumpaṟkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyil [piṟa]kkiya
pe-

[ru]ne]tit tiṟakkamum ārttavan nakar(nakar) porttoḻil vācalil [viccātira]
toraṇamum mo-

[yt]toḷir punamaṇip putavamum kanamaṇik katavamum ni[ṟ*]ai śrī vicaiya[mu]m
[tu]ṟainirp pannaiyum vanmalai[yū]rai-

[yi]ṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum āḻkaṭa lakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭi(li)ṅkamum kalaṅkā [valvinai] ila-
ṅkācokamum koppuṟa niṟai-

[pu]nal māpappāḷamum kāvalan(p)puricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷappantūṟuṭai[vaḷai]-
pantūṟum kalaittak-
kor pukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamā palvinai mātamaliṅkamum ka[lāmu]ṟil

tenakkalarpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumural [kaṭāramum] māp-
poru taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa [ko]-

mārāyar mārāciyār tec-
cappaṉ cempiyanmātevi uṭaiyārkku iravum paka-

viḷakku eriya nāṅkaḷum eṅkaḷ varkattārum aṭṭakkaṭavo-
menṟu manṟāṭi kāri aṟaiyan koṇṭa kācu

nāl āṭu 33- nāl āṇṭuvarai aṭṭakkaṭava ney 33 3- m ēkaviran

[kā]cu 25- nāl āṭu 22 i-nāl āṇṭu-

varai aṭṭakkaṭava ney 22 2- m araṅkan kaṇavatiyum araṅkan maḻuvāṭiyum

No. 638.
(A.R. No. 78-B of 1895). This inscription is engraved below No. 78-A.
ON THE SAME WALL.

edition.l:
kulacunta riyār uṭaiyār vaicciyanāta dē varkkuk kuṭu[t*]ta tanta kkāl paḷḷikkaṭ-
ṭil 1- m iru[paṟ]ai nilaikkaṇṇā-

ṭi aṭiyum kāmpum tarāvuṭpaṭa nilam This symbol which usually denotes nilam stands for niṟai in this inscription. 117 palam kaṇṇāṭi 1- m tarākkāl [1] nilam 36
palam 3 i-c cāṇiḷa-

l.ta: ttu neytāṅkiyum aṭiyum uṭpaṭa pittaḷai viḷakku

inscription.p:
Lines 1 to 42 have been published in the South-Indian Inscriptions,
Vol. III, Part II, No. 79.

l.ta: eḻuntaruḷuvittu ittevarkkut tiruvamutukku nāḷoṉṟukku arici patakkum
kaṟiyamutukku nel irunāḻiyum miḷakamutukku nel uriyum uppamutukku
nel uḻakkum neyyamutukku nel uriyum virakukku nel irunāḻiyum aṭai-
kkāyamutukku nel uriyum veṟṟilaikku nel uḻakkum tiruviḷakku ney āḻākku-
kku nel irunāḻi uriyum tirupparicaṭṭattukku nel nāḻiyum vaṇṇattānukku
nel āḻākkum āka nel aiñkuṟuṇi aṟunāḻi muḻākku itil arici patakkukku
patakkeḻuvaṇṇam nel tūṇi nānāḻi muḻakku nikki nel kuṟuṇi orunāḻi muḻakkum
kuṟukūli nel nāṭuriyum āka nāḷ oṉṟukku ūrkkālāl nel tūṇip patakkāka
nāḷ munnūṟṟaṟupatukku nel nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalam itukku uṭaiyār tirumaḻu-
vāṭiyuṭaiyār tevatānam kalaiyamaṅkalam kāṇiyāḷariṉṟi tevare kāṇi-
yeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa tiṭal nilam ivvūr toṟṟiṉa nāḷ mu-
tal uḻutu naṭakkaṭavataṉṟiye niṟkumel kuḻikkolāl iraṇṭuma-
ṭṭu ucaramāy kiṭanta nilam mikutik kuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka veli itil
tiruttina nilam orumāvaraiyum uṭaiyāṟ kāṭiyaruḷak kāverit tirumañcanam vai-
ppār nālvaṟku nila maraimā varaikkāṇiyināl panniraṭik kolāl kuḻi ā-
yirattu aiñnūṟṟu orupattu iraṇṭināl iraṭṭi kuḻi muvāyirat tirupattu nā-
lukku kuḻi oṉṟukku āḷ mūṉṟum kuḻi oṉṟukku āḷ nālum kuḻi oṉṟukku āḷ ai-
ñcum kuḻi oṉṟukku āḷ āṟum āka i
karaṇattānu maṟiya niravi viḻukkāṭu kuḻi oṉṟukku āḷ nālāka āḷ oṉṟuk-
ku nel kuṟiṇiyāka [ā]ḷ pannirāyirattu toṇṇūṟṟu āṟukku nel āyirat-
ti innilattukku ūrkku muṉpu paḻaiya tiṭal varicai māttāl nel kala-
māka iṟaikku uṭalāka niṅkum nel patin aiñkalane kuṟiṇi nānāḻi
ṭalām nel nūṟṟu eṇpatinkalamum tirumañcanattukku uṭalām nel jañpa-
ttu oṉpatiṉ kalane irutūṇip patakku nānāḻi āka nel irunūṟṟu aiñpattu
ttaval cellakkaṭavatākavum innilam uḻukuṭikaḷ cilvari pe-
ruvari maṟṟum eppeṟpaṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭava rallātārāka ā

ivai koyiṟkaṇakku nelkuppaiyuṭaiyān eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai tirumaḻuvā-
ṭip piccan eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai tiruvekampamuṭaiyār eḻuttu ippaṭikku
ivai aruṅkalamuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampala piccan eḻuttu ippaṭi-

kku ivai civapākkiyatevan eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai kaḻumalamuṭaiyār kulantāg-
kiyāna nālāyirappiccan eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai poṟkoyil piccan
eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai tillaināyakap piccaṉ eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai
piḷḷaikkaṭiyān

ceyya ivveḻuttu veṭṭinen ikkoyilil taccavācāriyan maḻuvāṭi viranāna
koṭṭaiyū rācāriyanen ivai e[n e]ḻuttu itu patmā heśvara ra [kṣai] [||*]

edition.l: svasti śrī [||*] pū maruviya puvi yeḻum puvi cūḻn-

l.ta: ta poru[p*] peḻun taṉṉiḻal maruviya taṉi veṇ-
ku[m*] muttamiḻu marupiṟappino ṭorumutalāy varu nāṇamum kaḷi-
kkaṟiyum paruva māriyum palaviḷaivum paḻutiṉṟi muḻutumākak kaṭaliṭai ye-
ḻucuṭa raṉṉan taṉṉaparaviroḷi yaṭalāḻi mānilattuk kaṇṭakare-
ṉum valliruḷ mutalaṟa veṟintiṭ ṭeyti maṉṉavaṟ kiṭiyurumo-
t tetticaiyilu maṟṟulāva porupuliyum pulvāyu morutuṟai-
[nī] ruṭaṉuṇṇa uḷveruvuṟ ṟuṭal naṭuṅkum puḷḷu māvu muṭaṉ
yiṉitu vaika maṟantalainiṉ ṟoruva roruvarai yiṟan talai-
yuṟā tiṉitoḻukap perumpulavaru maruṅkaviñaru nāppuṟu na-
ṟiravalarā yiṭumpai niṅkip puravalarāyp pukaḻpaṭaippac celaveṉa-
t teṉṉavaruñ cilaiyāṉaic ceralaru māliyāṉaik kāliṅkarum varā-
ṭic ciṅkaḷarum pāḻippaṭaip paṟamaṉṉarum maṇiniṟaivoṭu kaḻa-
mātu tirumārviṟ poli veyti viṟṟiruppat tirumaṭa-
tiruppap perunāṇmutaṟkum piṟappuṭaṉ muṉ muṉṟula kettavaru nāyaki
tirumaṭantaiyum paṭitoṟku mātarmaiññaiyum pirutikulan taṉi viḷaṅkap
pārileḻu cantirotaiyam tiruvāṇai vuṭa nāṇai ticai naṭāttun tiyākaval-
li kalakaveṅkatir maṇimuṭi kavittup puvaṉa naṟuntuṇai pū-
ṅkompu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷum puruntaṉaiya peruṅkaṟpil malāṭa kulamaṇi-
viḷakkut tiruntu nittila(ta) maṇimuṟuvaṟ terivai mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷum
ūḻiyūḻi piriyātu vāḻi maṇampuṇa[r*]n tiru[p*]pac cempoṉ vira
kaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa attatti ṉāḷ vaṭakarai i
ntāviḷakku oṉṟukku iravu pakal eriya nāḷ oṉṟukku ney uḻak-
kāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatukku ney toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻikku viṭṭa cāvā
muvāc cevvari āṭu toṇṇūṟum takark kiṭāy oṉṟum viṭṭu ivai kaik-
koṇṭu celuttakkaṭava tirununtāviḷak[kuk*]kuṭi iṭaiyaril araṅkaṉ vaiyicci-
[ya]nātaṉ viḷakku araikkālukku āṭu patinoṉṟe kālum tiruvāykkulan tiru-
maḻuvāṭi viḷakku araikkālukku āṭu patinoṉṟe kālum aracu cūṟṟi viḷak-
ku araikkālukku āṭu patinoṉṟe kālum uṭaiyāṉ kaṇavati viḷakku arai-
kkālukku āṭu patinoṉṟekālum aravaṇai tāḻi viḷakku mākāṇikku āṭu aiñ-
caraiye araikkālum tiruvaraṅkaṉ tūṇaṉ mākāṇikku āṭu aiñcarai-
ye araikkālum tirumaḻuvāṭi kūttaṉ viḷakku araikkālukku āṭu patinoṉ-
ṟe kālum kaṇṇan periyāṉ viḷakku araikkālukku āṭu patinoṉṟe kālum-
māṇikkaṉ kūttaṉ viḷakku araikkālukku āṭu patinoṉṟekālum āka viḷakku-
oṉṟukku kaikkoṇṭa āṭu toṇṇūṟum takark kiṭāy oṉṟug kaikko-
ṇṭu nāḷ nūṟṟaṟupattunālu mutal nāḷ oṉṟukku ney uḻakkāka can-

n neṟkuppai uṭaiyāṉ āṭko[ṇṭāṉ] tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā-
ṉāṉa co-

neṟkuppai uṭaiyāṉ paṭṭālakan ainna•••• ḻuvāṭi uṭaiyāṉāṉa
tiruvuṇāḻikai-

r[āya]n eḻuttu ippaṭi aṟiveṉ koyiṟkaṇakku neṟkuppai uṭaiyāṉ āḷu-
ṭai-

edition.l:
svasti śrī [||*] pū mannu patuma[m] pūtta [e]ḻu[la]kum tāmun ce[y]tavattā[l] paruti

jayamakaḷ ceḻumcantaṉac cuvaṭṭāl puya mirukaiyi-

l.ta:
laip p[o]ruppeṉat tonṟi nāmakaḷ tāṉum comakaḷ cevvāyp pavaḻac
[c]eyyoḷi paṭaittaṉa ni[y]āneṉa tavaḷanaṉiṟat tanittuyaiyeneṉa pukaḻmati
cintai makuḻu nāḷilum oru kuṭainilavu porupaṭait tikiri veleṉug karuṅkali
[yi]ruḷinait turappa nīṭupal lūḻi eḻkaṭalp puṟattiṉum ko-

viṟṟiruppa umpariyānai oreṭṭiṉukkum tampameṉnat tanittani ticaitoṟum

niṟpa pacipak[ai] ā[tiy]ākiya vīcu taṇpuṉalum metini vaḷaṉum
jāti yoḻukkamum nīti yaṟamum piḻaṟātu
paṇaikkai māvu mallatu vaṉṟalai paṭutal kaṉavilug kāṇṭaṟ ka[ri]teṉa varu

punali-
lum palaveṟu puḷḷilu mallatu ciṟaiyenappaṭuta liṉṟi pallavar teluṅkar māḷa-
var kaliṅkar teṉnar kaṉnaṭar kaṭārar coḷar ciṅkaḷar toṅkaṇar [śrī]ha

r
aṅka[r*] vaṅka(ra)r mattamattirar ka[g]kar jona-

kar kaikaiyar jinareṉ ṟaṟaikaḻalventar mallāvaracaru muṟaimaiyil varinta tiṟai-
ku[ṇan] tiṟai

ampon malaṟko[ṭi] cempiyan[ki]ḻā[naṭi] yorumarug kuṭa-
namarnatiruppa aruḷpuri camaiyap poṟkoṭi yimaiyappāvaiyum civanumpol
puva[na]muḻutuṭaiyā(ḷ)ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovi

āvatu mutal kāṇipeṟṟapaṭikku pāṇa[ṉ] irumuṭi-
coḻan pirānāṉa acañcalapperaya(n)nukku uyyakkoṇṭ[ā*]r[va]ḷanāṭṭu

tiraimurnāṭṭu u[ṭ]aiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṟku pāṭavum ikkoyilil
taḷiyillār tev(ā)raṭiyārai [p]āṭṭuvikkavum pāṇarai iṭakkaṭava(n)nāka iva-
nukkum ivan va[g]-

ttāṟkum ikkoyil pāṇapeṟāka munpu peṟṟuvarum kācum nellum uḷpaṭa
yāṇṭu onpatāvatu mutal nāḷ onṟukku ūrkkā(l)lāl nel kalamāka vanta
nellu ikkoyilil palapaṇi nivanta[k]kāṟaroṭug kūṭa nivantag kaṭṭi innel-
lukku veṇṭum nilam munnuṭaiyārai tavirttu ittevar tevatānamāna ūr-

ka(ḷ)ḷi(l)le pāṇakāṇiyum nila jivitamum[āka a]ṭaittu munpu pāṇar kuṭiyirup-
pāna maṉaiyum ivanukku viṭṭu ippaṭikku kal[v]eṭṭi koḷvatāka onpatāvatu
mutal

tañ cetaruḷina tirumukam malaiyappirāya-
rum tirumantira olai putukkuṭaiyārum eḻuttiṭṭa tirumukappaṭiyum puro-

vari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi neṭuma[ṇa]muṭaiyānu[m*] purovari śrīkara[ṇa]nāyakam
ponnuḻānum purovari śrīkaraṇamukaveṭṭi paṇṇainallūruṭaiyānum puro-
vari śrīkaraṇamukaveṭṭi veḷārkiḻavanum purovari śrīkaraṇamukaveṭṭi aracū-
ruṭaiyānum purovari śrīkaraṇanāyakam ceṟṟūruṭaiyānum purovarikkūṟu
pa[g]ka[ḷa]rāyarum ciṅkaḷarā[yarum] [va]ya[n]āṭṭaraiya-

rum eḻuttiṭṭa uḷvarippaṭi ittevar [te]vatānamāna uyyakkoṇṭārva[ḷa]-
nāṭṭu tiraimurnāṭṭu cempiyankuḷattūril kulottuṅkacoḻavatikku kiḻakku
mu[ñ]cikkaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟku kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻavatikku meṟku ta[rāp]-
paḷḷakkaṇṭattukku vaṭakku naṭuviṟkaṇṭattu nilam onṟe mukkāle araikkāṇi
muntirikai kiḻaraiyum itan teṟku kiṭāraṅko-

teyam tirai[mu(r) rellai]kku vaṭakku pāmpuṇi-
kiḻān nilattukku kiḻakku nilam mukkāle nālumā araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum
āka nilam iraṇṭaraiye nālumāk kāṇi araikkāṇi kiḻaraikku nilavopāti-
yāl nel munnūṟṟu nāṟpa[t]ton[pa]tin kala[ttin]ā luṟai[n]ā[ḻi] yeṟṟi
nel munnūṟṟaṟupatin kalattukkum

ivai koyiṟkaṇakkuk kuṇṭaiyūrkiḻava neḻuttu ippaṭikku i[v]ai tevarkanmi
tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭan eḻuttu ippaṭikku ivai śrīkāriyam mu[la]ṅkuṭaiyān
eḻuttu iv[ai] tiruviti anpaṟkaracin eḻuttu yāṇṭu

vatu cempiyankuḷat-
tūril tārāppaḷḷacaṇṭattu p[ā]mpuṇi[ki]ḻān nila[ttu]kku kiḻakku mun[pu
uṟ]ai-

nāḻi nellukkenṟu nikki pinpu pukunta ni[la]m yum āka nilam

kalatt[ā]lum i[ vai k] oyiṟkaṇakku kuṇṭaiyūrkiḻava n[e]ḻuttu ippaṭikku

koyil patipātamūlap paṭṭuṭai pañcācāriya tevakaṉmikku[m*] koyilkaṇakka-
ṉukku[m*] śrīmāye

rak kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañce[y*]vāṉuk-
kum ikkoyil uṭukk

vācippār paṅku kāṇiyuṭaiya eṇṇariyāṉ eṉkiṟa-
vaṉ pakkale nammai cevikkum naṭṭuvaril kulottuṅkacoḻa niruttapereyaṉ
vilaikoṇṭu aṉupavittu

varukiṟa paṅkiraṇṭum ivaṉ vilai koṇṭa piramāṇappaṭiye ivaṉukkum ivaṉ
vaṟkattāṟkum kāṇiyāy aṉupavikkavum ippaṭikku ikkoyilile kal veṭṭa-

vug kaṭavatāka peṟaveṇu[m*] eṉṟu ivaṉ namakku coṉṉamayil ippaṭi
ceyyakkaṭavatāka coṉnom ippaṅku iraṇṭum eṇṇariyāṉ eṉkiṟa ivaṉ
pakkal ivaṉ vilaikoṇṭa piramāṇappaṭiye ivaṉukkum

ivaṉ vaṟkattāṟkum kāṇiyāy aṉupavippatākavum ippaṭikku ikkoyil tiru-
matiḷil kal veṭṭalām

ccuṭaiyāṉ
pakkal eṇṇariyāṉ koṇṭa piramāṇattile ciyattaṉum ivaṉ makkaḷ eḻut-
tuk kiṭakk

yālum eṇṇariyāṉ pakkal āṭavallāṉ kulottuṅkanittape-
reyaṉ koṇṭa piramāṇattile ciyattaṉum ivaṉ makkaḷum eṇṇari-

yāṉum ivaṉ makkaḷ eḻuttuk kiṭakkaiyālum ippiramānattile patipātamūla
paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyat tevakaṉmi koyil kaṇakkaṉ eḻuttuk kiṭakkaiyālum
ippiramāṇaṅkaḷil eḻutinapaṭiye piramāṇappaṭiye kalluveṭṭik kuṭuppatu

ṭattu kulottuṅkacoḻavatikku kiḻakku marutamāṇikkamayakkal eṉṟu peru-
ṭ

ravatikku meṟkku

niccal aṭṭuvatāṉa ney āḻākku [nā]raṇaṉ kumā-

laṉ [kāṇi] araikkāṇi-

nātapaṭṭaṉ cāperā yivaṉu[k*]ku(ka)
ñātiyu millāmal tu-

ramum muṭṭu varukaiyil yinta paṅkil nampil oṉṟu pātiyum tevakaṉmattil oṉṟu
pātiyum nāḷ

tilukku tāṉ kāṇiyāṭcaiākak kaiyāṇṭu ikkoyilil
acaṟpaṅkil nampum

uṭaimaiyum iṟaiyiliyum maṉaiyum-
(t) toṭṭa[mum] toṭṭakkūṟum maṟṟum eṟpeṟpaṭṭa cuva

vaṟ cellak
kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kāṇiāṭ[cai]ākak kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷumpaṭi kaṟ
pittu viṭṭa aḷavukku [||*]

inscription.head:
No. 762.
(A.R. No. 198 of 1895).
ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

l.ta:
vaṟku
yāṇṭu iraṇṭāvatiṉ etir nāṟpattu iraṇṭāvatu
m ivaiyug kuṟaivaṟat tiruppaṇiyuñ ceyvittu āvaraṇa

ttuk kottil veṇṭuvāraiyug kaṟpittu naṭantupotukacceyte nāmum iṉa-
ṉāyaṉāṟkut tiruvolakkama

ṇṭapamun tiruppaṇi cey-
vittu muṉpu kaṟpitta per niṅkalāka eṭṭām paṅku

ṉaiyum kaṟpittu iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa paṟṟile
nāṟpattu iraṇṭāvatu pacāṉamutalukku kā-

rpacāṉam uḻutukoḷḷumpaṭi kaṟpittu irupattoraṭik kolāl per oṉṟukku
orumā arai nilamāka nālumā varai nilam iṟaiyiliyum per oṉṟukku patiṉ-
muṉṟu muḻattu maṉai oṉṟāka maṉai muṉṟum
kalāka[p] per oṉṟukku nāḷtoṟum irunāḻi arici

mum peṟṟu uṭkoyil puṟakkoyi luṭpaṭa acaṟpaṅkukku otta mari-
yāti turamum ceytu cuvantiraṅka ḷuḷḷatum peṟṟup

ṉum taṉ viḻukkāṭu uḷḷa
nāḷ uṭaiyār

ṉaiyum nācciyār ulakamuḻutumuṭaiya nācciyāraiyum
pūjittu maṟṟum uṭkoyil

ttu acal nampukku otta mariyāti uṭai-
maiyum cuvantiraṅkaḷum peṟṟup potumpaṭiyum kaṟpitta aḷavukku immariyāti-
yile iṉṉāḷ mutaluk-

ku ivvolai piṭipāṭāka iṟaiyili nilam nālumā araiyum maṉaikaḷum toṭṭak-
kūṟukaḷum uṭaimai nīṅkalākak kaṟpitta

inscription.head:
No. 763.
(A.R. No. 199 of 1895).
ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

l.ta:
āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu eṇpattu oṉṟiṉmeṟ cellāniṉṟa nam kumāraṉ
arikecaritevarāṉa parākkiṟamapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu

miyum(yum) putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ
nam melaivitiyil vitaraṇaviṉotaṉperunteruvil maṭapatikaḷil tattuvappiṟa-
kācaṉukku

muṉṉāḷ nām maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭuk kalluveṭṭik kuṭutta vakaiyil pākūril viṭṭa
nilam māṟikkoṇṭu nilamāka maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭa teṉṉārināṭṭu nal[lū]ṟpaṟ-
ṟil kaṟṟucceṟṟai-

ppaṟṟukkup perunāṉ kelkaiyāvatu kiḻellai āṟṟukku meṟku teṉellai
cāttāviṉ nilat[tu]kku[m*] paṟṟukkum taṇṇampaikkum vaṭakku melellai
puḷiyaṟaiyil ellai-

kkum [p*]eruvarampukkum kiḻakku vaṭaellai āṟṟukkut teṟku innāṉ kellaikku
uṭpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey paṭṭaṭai koṭittoṭṭam māvaṭai maravaṭai
maṟṟum

nāg koḷḷum komuṟaipāṭukaḷum maṟṟum eṟpeṟpaṭṭa cuvantiraṅkaḷum ivaṉu-
kku

inscription.head:
No. 764.
(A.R. No. 200 of 1895).
ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SUBRAHMANYA SHRINE IN SAME TEMPLE.

edition.l:
svasti [||*] sandhāryamētat sattam samastasuramaulibhiḥ [|*] śāsanam viśvanāthasya
śambho[rjayati] śāśvatam [||*] ādicaṇḍēśvarājñēyam ||

l.ta: āyirattu nānūṟṟu aṉpattu oṉpatil meṟ cellāniṉṟa

l.gr:
candrakulapradipa madhurāmahēndra jayantamaṅgaḷapuravarādhīśvara kṣēmāsura-
nārasiṁha kēraḷatamōdivākara cōḷasindhu[ba]ṭabā-

nala āhavarāmanandana sāhitya sārvabhauma kōjaṭilavarmarāna tribhuvanaccakravatti
kō

l.ta: kak kaṟpittu maṉai oṉṟukkum nilam orumāvukkum nam

ṉum kaṇakkiṉpaṭi teṉṉārināṭṭu teṉkāciyil [ko]yil
tāṉattāril oñcāṇṭikkāttāṉ vakaiyāka na[m]

kaṇṭuḻavu tirntu ivv[āṇṭu] pacāṉa mutalukku kārpacānam payircceytukoḷ-
ḷumpaṭi kaṟpittu viṭṭa mutaṟkaṇṇāṟu taṭi oṉṟu nila-

m araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ mākāṇiyum iraṇṭāg kaṇṇāṟu taṭi iraṇṭu nilam
araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum taṭi iraṇṭu nilam kāṇi

l.note: The last line of this inscription is much damaged.

inscription.head:
No. 765.
(A.R. No. 201 of 1895).
ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SHRINE IN THE KULASEKHARAMUDAIYAR TEMPLE
IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

l.gr:
caṅrakula-
pradipa madhurāmahēṅra jayantamaṅgaḷapuravarādhīśvara kṣēmāsuranārasiṁha
kēraḷatamōdivākara cōḷasindhuvaṭavānala sāhityasārvabhauma dēva-
brāhmaṇasthāpanācāryya kōjaṭilavarmmarā

l.ta:
āka naṭantuvarumpaṭikku itukaḷukku veṇṭum celavukkum viṭṭa nam
vācaṟkaṇakkar iṭṭa kaittaṭippaṭi kuṟumaṟaināṭṭu kuṟugakāṉamāṉa irācacū-
riyanallūṟkum toppukkum ellaiāvatu teṉellai ciṟṟāṟṟukku vaṭakku vaṭa-
ellai veḷḷāḻaṉkuḷattuk karaikkāṭṭu ellaikku teṟku melellai vaḻitiyūr-
paṟṟukkum kuḷattukkum cuntiraparaṇṭiyapurattu ellaikkum kiḻakku kiḻellai
kalaṅkal uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟu āṉaikuḷattil ellaikkum kumāraneripperuvaḻikkum
taṭṭappāṟaippo[ṉ]-

lukkum kuṉiccāṉpāṭi ellaikkum aṟiñcāpirāṭṭivatikkum meṟku āka iṉ-
ṉāṉ kelkaikku uḷpaṭṭa periyakuḷam akavayal puṉakkuḷam itila muṉ uṇ-
ṭākiya

yam maṭappuṟam ayyaṉpātti ammaiviḷākam teṟ-
kil iṭaitavaṇaiyum nīṅkalāka uṇṭākiya akavayal puṉakkuḷam nañcai puñcai
nattam ceyttalait tiṭar

kūpam māvaṭai maravaṭai melum uṇṭākiya
ākkapperukkam toppu ūttaippā[ṭṭa][m*]

pācivilai cekkiṟai taṟikkaṭamai koṭikkaṭamai ulāvukāṭcai teṉpaṭu poṟṟai
mīṉpaṭu paḷḷam maṟṟum eṟpeṟpaṭṭa

kaḷukkum nām koḷḷum
komuṟaiyāka uḷḷa eṟpeṟpaṭṭatum nam variyuḷār kaṇakkilum tavirttu iṉ-
ṉāḷ mutalukku tevatāṉam āka

ivvālaiyam uḷḷaaḷavāka cem-
pilum cilaiyilum veṭṭi kaiyāṇṭukoḷḷavum pāṟka ivai koṭumaḷūruṭai-
yāṉ eḻuttu

inscription.head:
No. 766.
(A.R. No. 202 of 1895).
ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

l.gr:
subhamastu [||*] sandhāryamētat satatam samastasuramaulibhiśśāsanam śrīkulaśē-
kharanāthasya śaṁbhōrjayati śāśvatam [||*] ādicaṇḍēśvarā-

l.ta:
t[e]vaṟku yāṇṭu añcāvatu piṟa-
pava varuṣam āvaṇi ṭṭam

tiṟitikaiyum cukkiṟavāramum keṇṭayokamum vaṇikkaraṇamum peṟṟa uttiraṭ-
ṭāti nāḷ

yattukku toṇṭarkaḷ māṭāpattiyak kāṇiyāṭcaiyum toṇṭarkaḷ meppaṭi
kaṇakkum kāṇiyāṭcaiyum āka

[ca*]t turaṟkkāṟa[rk*]ku varaviṭukaiyil nam vācaṟkāriyam tirunelvelipperu-
māḷ kāliṅkarāyaṉum nam a[ṟ]cakaril parāk[kiṟa]-

mapāṇṭiyapaṭṭaṉum ālaiyakkaṇakku caṅkaranayiṉāṉum iṭṭa kaittaṭippaṭikku
kāḷaiyāṉ

[t]oṇṭarkaḷkaṇakku kāṇiyāṭcai iṟaiyiliāka viṭṭa nilam orumāvukku vaṭa-
vārināṭṭup parākkiṟamapāṇṭiyappereri•

kār mutalukku iṟaiyiliyāka
viṭṭa cekavīrarāmaṉ tiruttu naṭu•

• l viti 7- g kkaṟu kiḻelkai civalapārati tāṉaiṟaiyilikku meṟku teṉelkai
āṇṭi vāṇātarāyaṉukku a••

l.ta:
iṟaiyi[li]yāka viṭṭa nilattukku [va*]ṭakku melelkai meṟpaṭiyāṉ iṟaiyilikkum
teṉvaṭal oṭiya kālukkum kiḻakku vaṭavelkai

•••• tāṉaiṟaiyilikku teṟku āka iṉṉāṉ kelkaik kuḷpaṭṭa
26 20- g kkaṟu kiḻelkai

l.ta:
••• [ma]ṭattukkum teṉvaṭal oṭiya kālukkum meṟku teṉelkai pāṭ-
ṭattukku vaṭakku melelkai teṉ[vaṭa] loṭi••

••• lukku[m pā]ṭṭattukkut tekku vaṭaelkai kiḻme(l) loṭiya kā(l)-
lukkum pāṭṭattukkum teṟku āka iṉṉāṉ kelkaik kuṭpaṭṭa•••

edition.l:
•••••• viti 2- ṅkkaṟu kiḻelkai pāṭṭattukku meṟku
teṉelkai taṉatu iṟaiyi[li*]kku vaṭakku melelkai coḻakoṉperuṅkā-

l.ta:
••• kiḻakku vaṭaelkai pāṭṭattukku teṟku [āka] iṉṉāṉ kelkaikku
uḷpaṭṭa

••• kku meṟku teṉelkai kiḻme loṭiya kālukku vaṭakku melelkai
teṉvaṭa loṭiya kālukku kiḻakku vaṭaelkai taṉatu iṟaiyili-

••• kkaṟu
kiḻelkai civalapārati iṟaiyilikku meṟku teṉelkai [pi]lāṟṟu-

••• me loṭiya kālukku vaṭakku melelkai teṉvaṭa loṭiya kālukku
kiḻakku vaṭavelkai civalapārati tāṉaiṟaiyilikkum kiḻme-
•• ṭiya kālukkum teṟku āka iṉṉāṉ kelkaikkuṭpaṭṭa

āka [viṭṭa] iṉ[ni]lam nāṉmā[vum] maṉai oṉṟu ku
viṭ[ṭa]

•••••• llūril caṉṉatitteru•••••
. elkaikku••••• ṉukku viṭṭa ma-

••• meṟku teṉelkai caṉṉatitteruvukku vaṭakku melelkai••
•••• vatikku kiḻakku•••••

•• nārācattukku teṟku āka iṉṉāṉ kelkaik kuḷpaṭṭa pattu muḻattu maṉai
oṉṟum maṉainer toṭṭamum toṭṭa[k*]kūṟum nir

••• tukku picā[ta*]m irun[āḻiyu]m mātam oṉṟu[kku] uṭaimai paṇama
muṉṟum nel[k] koṭṭai muṉṟum acalkkaṇakki[ṉu*]kku otta pala cuvanti-

••• m toṇṭarkaḷ māṭāpattiyam kāṇiyāṭcaikku [nāḷ] oṉṟukku
picā[ta*]m irunāḻiyum mātam oṉṟukku uṭaimai paṇam muṉṟu-

••• kku [pa]ṇa[m mu]ṉṟum maṟṟum pala cuvantiraṅkaḷum iṉṉāḷ mutalukku
kāṇiāṭcai iṟaiyiliyākak kaiyāḷumpaṭikku

••• mutalukku nām koḷḷum muṟaipāṭāka uḷḷa eṟpeṟapaṭṭatum nam
[vari]yuḷār kaṇakkilum ta[vir]ttuk kāṇi-

••• yākak kaṇakkum eḻutik[koṇṭu mā]ṭāpattiyamum keṭṭukkoṇṭu
ācantirāṟkam cantatippiṟavecame iṟaiyi-

••• paṇa uṭaimai nellu uṭaimai [maṉai] eṟppeṟpaṭṭatum kāṇi-
yāṭcaiyākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kaiyāṇ-

inscription.head:
No. 767.
(A.R. No. 203 of 1895).
ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE KUTTALANATHA TEMPLE AT KUTTALAM,
SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

l.gr:
śrīmat kuṭṭhālanāthasya śambhōrja[yati] śāsanam [|*] brahmādibhiśśirōdhāryam
bhaktimuktipradāyakam [||*] ādicaṇḍēśvarājñēyam śakābdam 13[3]7
l.ta:
mel cel-
lāniṉṟa nam kumāraṉ parākkiṟa[ma*]pā

ṭṭaṉum niṅkalāka acaṟpaṅkāḷar nāluperum ūrvaḻi
poy nam a
nai muṭṭuvantu itu nam kumāraṉ parākkiṟama

vaṉ keṭṭu
ivaṉai varakkāṭṭi nam a

nai muṭṭuvarāmal naṭattuvāṉākavum ūrvaḻi poy
nam a

tticā tāṉatukoṇṭu itu
varāmal nāṅkaḷ ūrvaḻi poy muṭṭuvittavatukku muṭṭāmal pukka

ṭṭaṉukku paṅkukku oruṉāḷāka kuṭuppomeṉṟu collukaiyil ivarkaḷ
poruntiṉa mariyātiyile mutaliyāṉa kulacekarapaṭṭaṉār añcil

nāḷ oṉṟum ciṟutta[ṇ]ṭaiyagakāṉu maḻakiyāṉ ṉāḷ añcil ṉāḷ oṉṟum tiruk-
kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ ṉāḷ añcil ṉāḷ oṉṟum civa

ṉāḷ añcil
ṉāḷ oṉṟum āka ṉāḷ ṉālum vāṅki ivaṉ• ām paṅku kāṇiyāṭciyā[ka]
paṭuttu ivarkaḷ uṭaimaiyum iṟaiyiliyum kuṟaittu ivaṉukku koṭukka eṉṉu-
maḷavil ivakaḷukku [ni]•• tukku paṟṟāka itu koṇṭu ivarkaḷ
uṭaimaiyum iṟaiyiliyum niṅkalāka

yākak kiḻaimārpil paṟṟil purāṇapaṭṭaṉ yiṟaiyilikkuk
kiḻakku kumāra

ṭṭaṉ yiṟaiyilikku vaṭakku taṭi iraṇṭu nilam kāṇiyum
itaṉ vaṭakku ta• ṟu nilam araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum āka nilam kāṇi
araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum ituvum kaṉṉāneriyil paṟṟil eḻāṅkaṇ•• ṭi
iraṇṭu nilam muntirikaiyiṉ mukkālukkuk kālukkut teṉmeṟku taṭi muṉṟu

nilam araimā yituvum itaṉ vaṭakkut taṭi iraṇ[ṭu*] nilam araikkāṇi munti-
rikai yituvum eṭṭāg kaṇṇāṟu kiḻaimārpukku kiḻakku taṭi muṉṟu nilam kāṇi-
yi (i)ṉ āṟumākkā•• ituvum itaṉ vaṭakiḻakkut taṭi mu[ṉ*]ṟu
nilam kiḻ mukkāle araikkāl ituvum itaṉ kiḻakkut taṭi muṉṟu nilam (nila)-
muntirikaiyiṉ āṟumāk kāṇi itil teṟkaṭaiya tiṟappukku

vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam kāṇiyiṉ araiye mākāṇi āka ni[la*]m iraṇṭu mā[vu]-
māki muṉṟāvatu kārmutalukku

yāka vi[ṭ]ṭu va•• ceytu
acaṟpaṅkāḷa(r)ṟku otta mariyāti
vācāri(y)yamum ābove this word is inserted ṇṭu taṉ••• nil kāṇiyumāka.a

ṉaiyum muṭṭāmal naṭattikkoṇṭu potumpaṭiyum
kaṟpitta aḷavukku immariyātiyile ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu

me kallilum cempilum veṭṭi nam ālayam
uḷḷa aḷavum eḻām paṅku kāṇiāṭcaiyāka •• ṭu aṉupavittu pota-
vum pāṟka parākkimapāṇṭiya
eḻuttu This line is a repitition.[||*]

inscription.head:
No. 768.
(A.R. No. 204 of 1895).
ON THE SAME WALL.

edition.l:
svasti śrī [||*] kocaṭilavaṉmarā[ṉa] tribhu vaṉacakravatti kaḷ śrīparākkiṟamapāṇṭiya-
tevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatiṉ etir ṉālāvatu miṉañāyaṟṟu irupatān
tiyatiyum aparapakṣa ttu pañcami yum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa a niṣa[ttu] nāḷ gauta ma
g[ō]tra ttu bōdhāyanasūtra ttu dē vakulapperumāḷ maṅkaipperumā[ḷ]
[gaṅgā]dharabha ṭṭaṉukku teṉvārināṭṭu uṭaiyār tirukkuṟṟālamuṭaiyanayi[nā]r
koyilil nampimāril ekanāyakabha ṭṭan muraikku ivaṉukku āyāsam āy pūcai
muṭṭu varukaiyila

l.ta:
rum niṅkalāka acaṟpag-
kāḷar nāluperum ū[r]vaḻi poy pūcai muṭṭuvikka itukoṇṭu pūcai muṭṭu
vārāmal nam

ṉai per viṭṭu pūcai naṭatta vaṭṭam ceytu ūrvaḻi poy
niṉ nālu paṅkāḷaraiyum

niyum uruttaveṇumeṉṟu
ṉām kopittirukkacceyte ivarkaḷ itu vārāmal eṅkaḷ muṟai tirntu
[pū]jitta

nāḷ āka kuṭuppom eṉṟu kaṟpittu
mutaliyār

ku[la]cekarapaṭṭaṉ nāḷ añ•• oṉ[ṟu*]m ciṟuttaṇṭaiyumkālum
aḻakiyāṉ nāḷ añcil nāḷ oṉṟum ti[ru*]kkuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ nāḷ añ-
cil nāḷ oṉ[ṟu*]m civa

[nā]ḷ añcil nāḷ oṉṟum āka nāḷ
nālum kuṭuppom eṉṟu ivarkaḷ collukaiyāle ivarkaḷ poruntina mari-
yātiyile nāḷ nālum ivaṉukku eḻām paṅku kāṇiyāṭcaiyāka kuṭuppatuñ
ceytu ivakaḷ uṭaimaiyi iṟaiyiliyilum

kuṟaitta nāḷ viḻukkāṭṭil kuṭukka eṉṟa aḷavil ivarkaḷukku paṟṟāka itu
koṇṭu ivakaḷ uṭaimaiyum iṟaiyiliyum niṅkalāka kiḻaimarapilpaṟṟi-

inscription.head:
No. 862.
(A.R. No. 298 of 1895).
ON ANOTHER STONE KEPT IN THE SAME PLACE.

edition.p: Bāgh6i rāḥat bakh6sh6 gulzāri iram ra toāmān.
Bānīyash6 kh6āni Jahāngīr ast bā tamkīngsh6ān.
Sabzā,sh mīnāwash6s gulhash6 hamcḵon simo zar.
“Bāgh6i minā” cāli tarikh6ash6 kh6irad gufta azan.

translation.p: In the name of God, the merciful and compassionate.
This delightful garden, a twin of the garden of Paradise.

Its founder is the world-conquering (Jahangir) Kh6an, with dignity and
majesty.
Its verdure is like enamel' its flowers like silver and gold.

Hence wisdom composed the chronogram: “Enamelled garden.”
1104 A. H. — 1692 A. D. I am indebted to Mr. G.Yazdani, M.A., the Government Epigraphist for Moslem inscriptions for
text and translation of this inscription.

No. 1337.
(A.R. No. 386-J of 1896).
ON THE SAME PILLAR. A very fine figure of Balarā0ma with the plough in his left hand, the right hanging down and
on the head of a standing figure, is inserted in the wall of the shrine with the Āḻvārs. People on the spot say
that it is purposely so placed to hide the entrance into the treasure called Śankhanidhi. So is a figure of
Srī0nivā0sa found on the corresponding left side hiding the entrance into the Padmanidhi.

l.ta:

yārkku muṉpil āṇṭukaḷil palarum vaitta tirununtāviḷakkukaḷ kalveṭṭil-
lātaṉa koyiṟkaṇakkut tiruoṟṟiyūruṭai-

yāṉ uṟavākkiṉāṉ kaṇakkil kaṇṭu kal veṭṭiṉapaṭi uṭaiyār tiruoṟṟiyūruṭai-
yārkku ikkoyilil t[e]varaṭiyāḷ cāṇi oṟṟiāḻvi vaitta tirunantāviḷakku
oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭukku ittevar tiruvi-

ḷakkukuṭi tiripuvanacuntaratteru maṉṟāṭikaḷil paṭampakkaṉ vallamuṭaiyāṉ aḷakku
ney nāṟpattaiññāḻiyum perāyira moṟṟi aḷakku ney nāṟpattaiññāḻiyum

inscription.p: Published in South-Indian Inscriptions, Vol. II, Nos. 4, 32, 63, 64, 79 to 97.

N.B.—Of A.R. No. 25 of 1897, lines 1 to 54 have been published in South-Indian
Inscriptions, Vol. II, No. 32: the rest of the inscription, engraved on two other pillars, is
given below:—

lated at the ends, are on the south wall.
